rationale: Contract/fence lens holds. git show 954d6ca8 --name-only lists ONLY internal/config/config.go and config_test.go. The config.go diff is 18 added lines, every one a `//` comment; stripping comment lines from before/after yields a byte-identical diff (exit 0), so no non-comment line moved. Reviewer.Model stays `string` at line 116 (grep-confirmed), not *string; no UnmarshalYAML added; Reviewer.model() and validateReviewerEntries bodies are unchanged — only doc comments precede them. The word `supersedes` flags the 112-R4 phrasing override in both comment blocks. The test file diff is purely additive (no deletions/edits to existing test lines), so the 112 suite is untouched. Empirically: go test ./internal/config passes (TestLoad_RefusesPerGateKnobs and all TestLoad_* green; TestLoad_EmptyStringModel both subtests PASS), go build ./... succeeds, git status clean. No behavioral change; the fence is intact.
